title: PikaWarrior's Vanilla+ Modpack
description: Client-side mods that make the vanilla experience better!
body:
# Welcome to the Best Vanilla Modpack experience ever:

## PikaWarrior's Vanilla+    (Fabric)

This modpack optimises the game's perfermance and contains the best client-side convenient quality of life mods that just make playing vanilla minecraft a better experience.

You should be able to play on 100% vanilla servers with no issues, just make sure they allow world map mods. Some features will only work if the server is also running the mods (like simple voice chat).

### Report a problem or something:
Email me at "**_pikawarrior25@gmail.com_**"

**Always** use the **latest version**.
